capabilities.name: Upload documents
capabilities.verify: manage_document + upload_document skillSeeds; DocumentsPage.tsx + AddDocumentDialog.tsx upload flow

capabilities.name: Folders/tags
capabilities.verify: manage_document skill accepts folder + tags; AddDocumentDialog folder input, DocumentsPage Folder column
capabilities.notes: Tags have no admin UI — only folder is editable/visible; tags exist on the skill surface only

capabilities.name: Link to business records
capabilities.verify: related_entity_type/related_entity_id in manage_document skill; DocumentsPanel.tsx embeds per-entity docs, DocumentsPage shows 'Linked to' badge

capabilities.name: Version history
capabilities.verify: no version table/skill/UI for documents (module description claims version tracking but no implementation found)

capabilities.name: Share links
capabilities.verify: only 120s signed URLs for in-admin viewing (getDocumentSignedUrl); no shareable-link feature or skill

capabilities.name: E-sign request
capabilities.verify: no e-sign skill or UI in documents module (signing lives in contracts module, not surfaced for documents)
